description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with docker:dind service. Define a build stage with two jobs: build and build-master. The build job runs on all branches except master, runs the global before_script to log in to the registry, then executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". The build-master job runs only on the master branch, runs the same before_script, then executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". No caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
